# [Scheduler & Orchestrator] to define when and how to run your data pipelines

## A scheduler is a system that runs your pipeline as you need it to

## An orchestrator is a sytem that runs your code where & how you want it to run

## Some tools are only schedulers (cron) and others are both schedulers and orchestrators (Airflow)

## [Project] Use Apache Airflow to schedule your dat pipeline
